title: Console · v0 scaffold (local-first)
notes: Local-first Artifact Workbench at http://localhost:8801 on Ciamac's Mac. Path A ratified 2026-05-24: pipeline.ciamac.com is NOT a v0 target. Grid-only home, 6-button bottom bar, sidecar-first registry. Inherits gallery v5 visual contract (dark, centered, Helvetica Neue 300/200/100, Caspian, portal-pulse-soft). No Today card, no Pieces matrix, no tabs. Six buttons: Open Preview, Open Folder, Resume Claude, Audit Build, Exit Ritual, Save for Later. Everything else is a labeled stub. See docs/CONSOLE.md for the local-first decision.
last_session_summary: v0.6 audited by Gemini, which caught the deployment-target gap. Path A locked: local-first. Two correctness commits shipped (Iranshahr fix, Phase A Console rename). Build paused pending Ciamac's priority order for next work.
next_action: Ratify Path A in chat. Then pick the next-step priority order: (1) docs already landed, (3) Ally workflow audit, (2) auto-discovery decision, (4) first non-fixture artifact, in that recommended sequence.
